* Snippets                                                         :noexport:

** DONE Inline greeting snippet                         :blog:lbsnippet:
CLOSED: [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:LOGBOOK:
- State "DONE"       from ""           [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:END:
:PROPERTIES:
:CREATED:  [2026-01-01 Wed 09:00]
:ID: snippet-greeting
:END:

Hello, dear reader

** DONE Nested outer snippet                            :blog:lbsnippet:
CLOSED: [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:LOGBOOK:
- State "DONE"       from ""           [2026-01-01 Wed 10:00]
:END:
:PROPERTIES:

:ID: snippet-outer

* Articles using snippets

:END:
:PROPERTIES:
:CREATED:  [2026-01-10 Fri 12:00]
:ID: 2026-01-10-snippet-article

I say [[id:snippet-greeting]] to everyone.
